subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up after the conference and your interest in partnering with our team. We'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to explore potential collaboration opportunities.

We have the following slots available for a 30-minute call next week:
- April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for you, and we'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we're unable to share internal contact information as per our company policy. All senior-level discussions will be coordinated through this email thread, and we'll ensure the appropriate team members are included in the conversation once we align on the meeting.

Thanks again for reaching out, and we look forward to speaking soon.

Best regards,
[Your Team]
